title: GetResponse vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Postmark?
faq.a: Postmark starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
